text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Surrender! You have nowhere to run!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Your mischief shall not continue under this class
rep's watch!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Grr! I can't get caught now!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Why have you switched everyone's right and left
shoes? They're all gonna be confused!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Huh? I didn't do anything like that.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
All I did was take the shoes out of their cubbies
so it looked like they walked off on their own.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
That's not what I heard though. Everyone was
complaining that their shoes were in the wrong
order...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, well I'm the one who put the shoes back in the
cubbies!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I knew that leaving the shoes out would just cause
trouble for everyone, so I put them back at
Bakushin speed!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
What kind of villain goes around stealing the
thunder for others' pranks?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
So the culprit is Bakushin O, but she was trying to
be helpful... What should a hero do in a situation
like this?
